translations.en: Weaponsmith
translations.zh: 兵器師

translations.en: a young, nervous-looking gargoyle.
translations.zh: 年輕且神色緊張之魔像。

translations.en: "The False Prophet!" the gargoyle screams. "Guards! Guards!"
translations.zh: 「偽先知！」魔像嘶喊。「護衛！護衛！」

translations.en: "An-bal-sil-fer!" the gargoyle screams. "Agra-lem! Agra-Lem!"
translations.zh: 「An-bal-sil-fer！」魔像嘶喊。「Agra-lem！Agra-Lem！」

translations.en: Suddenly realizing that he is holding a weapon, the gargoyle attacks!
translations.zh: 魔像忽然意識到自己手持武器，隨即發起攻擊！

translations.en: "To ask how I can help you, noble one."
translations.zh: 「問如何可助尊者？」

translations.en: "The False Prophet!"
translations.zh: 「偽先知！」

translations.en: "To thank you for your upcoming sacrifice."
translations.zh: 「感謝汝即將到來的犧牲。」

translations.en: "To greatly respect your nobility and courage."
translations.zh: 「對汝之高貴與勇氣，深表敬意。」

translations.en: "To not understand what that means."
translations.zh: 「吾不明白那是何意。」

translations.en: "To create these items for the use of @all."
translations.zh: 「製作這些物品，供@all眾人使用。」

translations.en: "To give these wares to any gargoyle who has need of them."
translations.zh: 「將這些物品贈予任何有需要的魔像。」

translations.en: "To invite you to look around at my @wares as well."
translations.zh: 「亦邀汝瀏覽吾的@wares物品。」

translations.en: "To ask if any of them interest you?"
translations.zh: 「問汝是否對其中有感興趣者？」

translations.en: "To have but a few items available."
translations.zh: 「目前僅有少數物品可供取用。」

translations.en: "To be far less adept than my former @master."
translations.zh: 「吾之技藝遠不如先師@master。」

translations.en: "To wish I had more boomerangs, that I might give you another."
translations.zh: 「真希望手邊有更多飛去來器，好再送汝一枚。」

translations.en: "To regret that I have such a small supply of zu ylem dust."
translations.zh: 「可惜吾的醒神塵存量極少。」
translations.note: zu ylem dust = 魔像藥粉，令人昏迷的粉末

translations.en: "To consider him a discredit to the race!"
translations.zh: 「吾認為他是吾族之恥！」

translations.en: "Most of all, to consider him a @dishonor to my late master!"
translations.zh: 「尤其，吾認為他是吾亡師之@dishonor恥辱！」

translations.en: "To cheapen all our loss, all our grief, by his self-pity."
translations.zh: 「他的自憐使吾等所有人的失去與哀傷都變得廉價。」

translations.en: "To have lost my @master, like a father to me."
translations.zh: 「吾失去了@master先師，他如父一般。」

translations.en: "Yet to maintain control, to maintain diligence."
translations.zh: 「然吾仍保持克制，保持勤勉。」

translations.en: "Most of all to maintain passion for life."
translations.zh: 「最重要的是，保持對生命的熱情。」

translations.en: "To feel that the goodscrafter dishonors us all by abandoning our principles."
translations.zh: 「吾認為工匠棄守吾族原則，是對吾等所有人的侮辱。」

translations.en: "To feel that the goodscrafter needs a trip to the @catacombs."
translations.zh: 「吾認為工匠需要到@catacombs地下聖所走一趟。」

translations.en: "Yes, to have visited them myself once, long ago."
translations.zh: 「是的，吾自身亦曾在久遠以前前往拜訪。」

translations.en: "To find there shrines to our three principles: control, passion and diligence."
translations.zh: 「在那裡，有供奉吾族三大原則的聖壇：克制、熱情與勤勉。」

translations.en: "To speak with these shrines and meditate, to receive new insight."
translations.zh: 「向這些聖壇祈禱冥想，可獲得新的領悟。」

translations.en: "To not remember where the catacombs are."
translations.zh: 「吾已不記得地下聖所在何處了。」

translations.en: "To be sent there by the Temple of @Singularity."
translations.zh: 「須由@Singularity獨身者神殿指引前往。」

translations.en: "To find that to the north, in the mountains."
translations.zh: 「在北方山中可尋得。」

translations.en: "To advise you to find some way to @fly if you wish to get there, though!"
translations.zh: 「然若汝想前往，建議設法@fly飛翔！」

translations.en: "To be unable to reach the Temple on foot; to be forced to fly over the mountains."
translations.zh: 「神殿無法徒步到達；唯有飛越山峰方可抵達。」

translations.en: "To be a powerful but dangerous drug!"
translations.zh: 「此乃強效但危險之藥劑！」

translations.en: "To turn gargoyle warriors into unstoppable fighters!"
translations.zh: 「服之可使魔像武士化身為無法阻擋的戰士！」

translations.en: "But to always be fatal after the battle ends."
translations.zh: 「然戰鬥結束後，必然致死。」

translations.en: "To be created by the snake @charmer, who lives to the southwest."
translations.zh: 「由住在西南方的@charmer馴蛇者所製。」

translations.en: "Yes, to suggest you visit him if you are interested."
translations.zh: 「是的，若汝有興趣，建議前往拜訪。」

translations.en: "To find the snake-summoning horn a most impressive sight!"
translations.zh: 「召蛇號角實為壯觀之物！」

translations.en: "To create the zu ylem dust from plants that can no longer be found."
translations.zh: 「醒神塵由如今已無處可尋之植物製成。」

translations.en: "But to know of far worse effects of the @disasters."
translations.zh: 「然吾知曉@disasters大災變帶來了遠更嚴重的影響。」

translations.en: "To see little of interest in that item."
translations.zh: 「吾對此物興趣甚淡。」

translations.en: "May your long work and strength lead to success!"
translations.zh: 「願汝之長久努力與力量引領至成功！」
translations.note: 道別語，兵器師版魔像祝辭

translations.en: "To be but a simple @weaponsmith, False Prophet."
translations.zh: 「吾不過是個普通@weaponsmith兵器師，偽先知。」

translations.en: "To lack a name, as is appropriate for my station."
translations.zh: 「吾無名字，此乃吾身份地位之應然。」

translations.en: "Yes, surely to know of the disasters?"
translations.zh: 「是的，汝應知曉大災變吧？」

translations.en: "To have only barely survived the earthquakes after the Codex disappeared."
translations.zh: 「守則之書消失後的那場地震中，吾僅以一息之差倖存。」

translations.en: "To be the master weaponsmith now, although to have but recently been a simple @apprentice."
translations.zh: 「如今吾乃兵器師首席，雖然不久前吾還只是一介@apprentice學徒。」

translations.en: "To greatly regret the loss of my master, killed during the @disasters."
translations.zh: 「對先師在@disasters大災變中喪命，吾深感悲痛。」

translations.en: "But to carry on in the face of adversity."
translations.zh: 「然仍於逆境中奮進。」

translations.en: "And certainly not to lose all passion for life, like the worthless @goodscrafter!"
translations.zh: 「斷不會像那個無用的@goodscrafter工匠一樣，失去對生命的所有熱情！」

translations.en: "To wish I could leave on adventures..."
translations.zh: 「真希望能出去冒險……」

translations.en: "But to be dedicated to my important @work."
translations.zh: 「然吾獻身於吾之重要@work職責。」

translations.en: "To know nothing of $Z, being but a simple weaponsmith."
translations.zh: 「吾只是個普通兵器師，對$Z一無所知。」

translations.en: "To ask that you see me at my shop!"
translations.zh: 「請汝到吾的鋪子來！」

translations.en: "Ah, to see you admire these boomerangs, the work of my @master."
translations.zh: 「啊，見汝欣賞這些飛去來器，乃吾@master先師之作。」

translations.en: "To regret being unable to create boomerangs myself."
translations.zh: 「可惜吾自身無法製作飛去來器。」

translations.en: "To have only a few left in stock
translations.zh: 「庫存所剩不多

translations.en: , but to offer you one."
translations.zh: ，然願贈汝一枚。」

translations.en: Do you accept the gift?
translations.zh: 你接受這份禮物嗎？

translations.en: As you take the boomerang, Shamino speaks.
translations.zh: 你接過飛去來器時，夏米諾開口。

translations.en: "Aye, 'tis a most interesting weapon, $G."
translations.zh: 「確是件極有趣的武器，$G。」

translations.en: "Perhaps when our quest is through I can study its use."
translations.zh: 「也許試煉結束後，吾可研究其用法。」

translations.en: The gargoyle speaks. "To ask if anything else interests you?"
translations.zh: 魔像說：「問汝是否對其他物品感興趣？」

translations.en: The gargoyle hands you a boomerang.
translations.zh: 魔像遞給你一枚飛去來器。

translations.en: The gargoyle nods. "Yes, to see that you already have enough weapons."
translations.zh: 魔像點頭。「是的，見汝已備有足夠的武器。」

translations.en: "To ask that you see me at my shop!"
translations.zh: 「請汝到吾的鋪子來！」

translations.en: "Yes, to be a very interesting weapon."
translations.zh: 「是的，此乃非常有趣之武器。」

translations.en: "To knock out even a large animal with just a single pouch of this powder!"
translations.zh: 「一小袋此粉末便能令大型獵物昏厥！」

translations.en: "To be used most often by hunters, to avoid harming the meat."
translations.zh: 「獵人最常使用，可避免損傷獵物肉質。」

translations.en: "Unfortunately, to make this powder from @plants that can no longer be found."
translations.zh: 「可惜，此粉末須以@plants如今已無處可尋之植物製成。」

translations.en: "Here, to offer you one."
translations.zh: 「來，贈汝一份。」

translations.en: Do you accept the gift?
translations.zh: 你接受這份禮物嗎？

translations.en: He hands you a small pouch. "To hope you find it useful."
translations.zh: 他遞給你一個小袋。「望汝得其所用。」

translations.en: The gargoyle nods. "To understand your reluctance."
translations.zh: 魔像點頭。「理解汝之顧慮。」

translations.en: "To know the dangers of zu ylem dust to the untrained user."
translations.zh: 「知曉醒神塵對未受訓練者之危險。」

translator_notes: 兵器師為年輕魔像，在大災變失去師父後自立為首席兵器師，對工匠的自憐深感不屑。遵守魔像三原則（克制、熱情、勤勉）。zu ylem dust 譯為「醒神塵」（實為昏迷粉末，但用字帶魔像語異文化感）。飛去來器、號角等道具詳細介紹保留。
